detail: Container aegisml: image must include a digest (@sha256:...).
explanation:
Pin container images by digest so deployments are immutable and auditable. Prefer referencing @sha256:... in the image field and promote changes through your GitOps pipeline.

Additional context: Verify admission or CI rejects images without digests before they reach production.

(Broader KB match tier: unfiltered.)
recommended_fix_summary: Set image to repo/app@sha256:<digest> and record the promotion in change management. Re-run policy check after updating manifests.

require_image_digest
